title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: binutils bug fix update
overview: An update for binutils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The binutils packages provide a collection of binary utilities for the manipulation of object code in various object file formats. It includes the ar, as, gprof, ld, nm, objcopy, objdump, ranlib, readelf, size, strings, strip, and addr2line utilities.Bug Fix(es): BFD: Dwarf Error: Offset (xxx) greater than or equal to .debug_str size (xxx). [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-84080)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for binutils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The binutils packages provide a collection of binary utilities for the manipulation of object code in various object file formats. It includes the ar, as, gprof, ld, nm, objcopy, objdump, ranlib, readelf, size, strings, strip, and addr2line utilities.Bug Fix(es): BFD: Dwarf Error: Offset (xxx) greater than or equal to .debug_str size (xxx). [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-84080)
